name: Colanode
description: Open-source, local-first collaboration workspace — a self-hosted Slack and Notion alternative with real-time chat, rich text pages, customizable databases, and file management.

notes.text: Before using the app: download and import the self-signed certificate into your browser. Navigate to https://YOUR_IP:4000/colanode.crt and install it as a trusted CA. This is required for Service Worker and OPFS storage to work.
Web UI: https://YOUR_IP:4000 — Server URL when adding a server inside the app: https://YOUR_IP:4000/config
Requires at least 4 GB RAM for the build process.
